text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days after her scrimmage with Tama Cross, I come across Oguri
Cap at the height of an intense training session.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Phew... Okay, just one more set!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch as her feet gouge the ground, propelling her forward. There's
no doubt about it—those legs are a force to be reckoned with.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Engulfed by her zeal for training, I lose track of time...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, it's you again.
choice_data_list: Nice work. Giving it your all, huh?
Nice work. Giving it your all, huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yep. I'm actually gonna be participating in the next tryout.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The deadline to apply for the race had already passed by the time I
had transferred in.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But after the race coordinators saw the scrimmage between me and
Tama, they decided to give me special permission to run in the next
tryout.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
If I do well during tryouts, I'll be one step closer to making my central
debut. I need to push myself now more than ever before.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh right. Sorry to keep asking you, but could you show me the way
one more time?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Anywhere near the school, as long as there's plenty of nature.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I didn't know there was such a vast forest behind the academy. This is
perfect. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, yes. This is it. The forest air out here is just right. It cleanses my
mind and calms my soul.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Back in the day, I'd always find myself running in these areas.
Eventually, the folks back home started suggesting I run in an
Umamusume race.
choice_data_list: So that's how you started racing...
So that's how you started racing...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah. It's thanks to everyone back home and their support.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I remember when I ran in my first regional race, the townsfolk made
me a huge banner, even though they were really busy working the
fields...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I had a race, everyone would gather at the end of the day
and feast in my name—win or lose.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
"What an amazing race!" "Watching you run is always a treat!" "Keep
at it!" ...I was always surrounded by words of encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That's why... I love running so much.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And I love racing too. The bonds it makes. The joy it brings. I love it
all.
choice_data_list:
You really care about the folks back home,
huh?

You really care about the folks back home,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Of course.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Everyone back home always says that seeing me race—seeing me run
so freely and happily—means the world to them.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: And my race with Tama was really fun. Just thinking about it gets my heart racing.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
If debuting means I get to run alongside other amazing racers as
strong and fast as Tama, then...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I want to debut as soon as possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even as she reminisces about the past and contemplates her present,
Oguri Cap's ambitions shine through brilliantly.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, that's enough chitchat for today. I should get back to my
training.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for bringing me here. I'll come to this forest to run when I
need to clear my mind and remember my roots.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'll be taking my leave. See you around.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap announces her departure and begins to walk away.
However, as she does so—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ah.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She abruptly stops in her tracks and crouches over.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm? Why the sudden change of expression?
choice_data_list: I thought you might be hurt...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: No... I'm fine. I just tore one of my shoelaces, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I glance down at Oguri Cap's shoes, and lo and behold, they're worn
down to basically nothing.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: It's no big deal. All of my shoes wear out quite quickly.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Gotta go buy a new pair again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oguri Cap ties the torn laces together and once again sets off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The damage on her shoes was nothing short of abnormal, probably
because she runs with such incredible force. Normal shoes could never
withstand that kind of wear and tear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap won't be able to realize her fullest potential if she keeps
running in those.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I have to do something about it.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I see everything's as pricey as ever.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey. You're that new trainer, yeah? The one always hangin' 'round
Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What's with the long face? Ya tryna find somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I tell Tamamo Cross about everything that had happened.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I getcha. C'mon, how'd Oguri not notice anything till now? She
sure can be a ditz.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Anyway! I'll help ya out. Tryouts are where ya go all out! It wouldn't
be fair to the trainers or herself otherwise!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: A'ight, we're pickin' the toughest shoes for her! Go big or go home!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: No biggie. Always glad to help.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Besides, this isn't just for her. If she doesn't hurry up and debut, how
am I s'posed to race her again?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, let's get started! What's your budget lookin' like? Gotta know
that before we can do anythin' else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the help of Tamamo Cross, I was able to pick out a pair of shoes
that can withstand Oguri Cap's power.
